nearbyPlaces.name: Ikatan Dokter Indonesia Cabang Banda Aceh

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Rated with 3 stars, this high-quality property provides guests with access to massage and restaurant on-site.

details.title: Children 0-3 year(s)

additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.reviewComments: I travel for company bussiness. We had an exhibition in Hermes Palace. But company don't have budget for me to stay at Hermes. So best hotel near Hermes is this Mekkah hotel. This hotel have strategic location, nice room. Maybe old building, but clean and neat. Nice staffs. And nice foods for breakfast. A lot of varieties of food, almost like a 4* hotel. I'm very pleased stay in Mekkah Hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kamar standard agak kecil & tidak ada jendela. Tetapi secara overall, hotel bagus, dekat dgn masjid Oman 👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
For a three star hotel, it’s a bit lacking, there’s no fridge inside the room, there’s no hot water, no hairdryer, they clean the bed everyday, but not the toilet/bathroom. :(

Note: standard room doesn’t have window. 

Good thing about the hotel is the receptionist and the doorman, they are very helpful. 

The location is good too.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I chose the Makkah hotel because of its proximity to the symposium location at BMA (Balai Meuseuraya Aceh), about 15-18 thousand by GoCar. The check-in process was quick, and the staff was responsive, but from the beginning of check-in, my room number 219 had issues. The door key card was problematic until I checked out (even on the last day, I had to open the door with a manual key from the staff). The bathroom was not well-maintained and there was an unpleasant smell coming from the drainage. On the first day, there was also a problem with the toilet flushing, but it was promptly addressed and worked well afterward. The breakfast menu was standard in terms of taste and options, in line with the rate. Unless absolutely necessary, I probably would not recommend this hotel, unless there are significant improvements to the facilities. Thank you.
comments.originalComment:
Sy memilih hotel Mekkah karena lokasinya yang dekat tempat simposium di BMA (Balai Meuseuraya Aceh), naik GoCar sekitar 15-18 ribu. Proses cek in cepat, staff cepat tanggap, tetapi dr awal cek in, kamar sy nomer 219 sdh bermasalah. Kunci kartu pintu bermasalah hingga saya cek out (di hari terakhir  bahkan untuk membuka pintu harus dengan kunci manual dari staf. Kamar mandi tidak terawat & ada bau masuk dari saluran pembuangan. Di hari pertama , ada masalah juga dari flushing WC, tetapi segera ditangani & berfungsi baik.
Menu sarapan pagi standard utk taste & pilihan menu, sesuai dengan rate. Sekira tidak terpaksa sekali, mungkin saya tidak akan merekomendasikan hotel ini, kecuali bila ada perbaikan berarti utk sarana & prasarana. Terimakasih.,

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The staff, including receptionist, bell boy, and restaurant staff, were very friendly and accomodating.
The hotel room was not quite so good. I stayed at standard room. Overall, the cleanliness in the bedroom area was good, but the en-suite bathroom that I had problem with. The toilet didn't even have a close lid for the water tank, but it worked just fine actually. The curtain was pretty dirty in the bottom. However, the hot water worked very well.
The staff cleaned the room everyday, even without me asking for it. And they replaced the amenities and the complimentary water bottle as well.
comments.reviewTitle: Friendly staff, but the room was just okay

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It was my first time staying in Mekkah Hotel, though it's the second time I visited Banda Aceh. The early check-in policy (from 5am) was really helpful, since my arrival to Banda Aceh from Medan was at the early morning. The staff is kind, friendly, and helpful. Since there is no refrigerator in my room, I asked them to entrust the foods that I bought in Medan into their freezer so I can bring back them again while I check-out later. The bed and the bathroom was okay: they're clean and the hot water worked perfectly. But I kinda surprise they don't have any satellite television, so the LED TV in the room only showed the national station. The WiFi connection was great so I could finish my jobs during the trip. And I found this interesting: the Mekkah Hotel is next door to Madinah hotel. For Moslem, you feel like doing Hajj pilgrimage (Mekkah to Madinah). Hence I can say, my staying here was pleasant and memorable.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I enjoyed my stay. Banda Aceh hotels are generally poor, aging and over priced. This hotel is only a few years old and caters mainly for businessmen. It is situated around 2.5 km from town. there are plenty of batchas  if you need transport. The cheaper rooms have no windows.all rooms I believe are non smoking. The bed was good, air conditioning fine. The bathroom was a little worn but the water was hot. The room was cleaned everyday and toiletries and free water was replaced. Tv had only local channels, wi fi worked well. The breakfast was indonesian buffet which I like. So there was rice, fish/ chicken, egg, vegetables, bread, 2fruits, one juice and coffee. The staff were polite and welcoming. Little English is spoken but that is normal. I think this is a good Acenese hotel.

comments.reviewComments: 출발지에서 온라인상으로 예약을 했는데 외부에서 따로이 또 계약을 하여 이중계약이 되어 본래 예약된 것은 무시되고 말았습니다. 이런 일은 있을 수가 없습니다. 외부에서 뭐라고 하면 예약문서를 그 쪽에 발송(이메일이나 팩스)하여 확인시키고 예약당사자와 조우했을 때 확인을 해서 만족을 줘야 했습니다. 외부인이 선의로 했을 수도 있으니말입니다. 무엇보다 선예약건을 존중해야 하고 혹시 변경이 불가피하다면 체크인당시 설명을 해줬어야 합니다. 이점 개선바랍니다.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 3 travelers found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Resepsionis bernama Nuri benar benar merusak mood saya utk beristirahat. Sewaktu saya cek in,Nuri selaku resepsionis dg angkuhnya tidak mau menerima cek in saya dgn alasan tdk ada kamar standar lg spt pesanan saya.saya dipersilakan mencari hotel lain atau saya bs menambah Rp 100.000, utk upgrade ke deluxe dan utk itu kamarnya tersedia.saya lalu menelepon pihak CS agoda,yg lgsg segera telpon ke resepsionis hotel ini.tetapi si Nuri tdk mengangkat telepon sama sekali.akhirnya pihak agoda telelpon ke hp saya dan saya ngotot minta Nuri mendengarnya.akhirnya dgn bantuan CS agoda yg sangat profesional,pihak hotel akhirnya memberikan kunci kamar ke saya tetapi tidak dgn rasa penyesalan dari nuri yg cuma berkata "ini kunci kamar anda.nanti masalahnya biar diselesaikan agoda dg manager saja" tanpa ada embel embel permohonan maaf atas insiden yg membuang waktu saya 30 menit. Akhir kata saya ucapkan terima kasih atas profesionalisme yg ditunjukkan CS agoda dan saya tdk ingin menginap lagi di hotel ini yg bs mempekerjakan org org tdk profesional spt Nuri.
